question: Zajtrk je prvi obrok dneva.
answer: Breakfast is the first meal of the day.

question: Zajtrk jemo zjutraj.
answer: We have breakfast in the morning.

question: Kosilo je obrok, ki ga jemo sredi dneva ali zgodaj popoldne.
answer: Lunch is the meal that we eat in the middle of the day or early in the afternoon.

question: Večerja je običajno zadnji obrok dneva.
answer: Dinner is usually the last meal of the day.

question: Večerjo jemo zvečer.
answer: We have dinner in the evening.

question: Tina ima rada pico in sladoled.
answer: Tina likes pizza and ice cream.

question: Mama ima rada hrenovki v štručki in zeleno solato.
answer: Mum likes hot dogs and lettuce.

question: Oče ima rad piščanca in ribo.
Tinin brat ima rad meso in ananase.
answer: Tina's brother likes meat and pineapples.

question: Babica ima rada juho in torto.
V torek imamo ribo in pomfri, paradižnike in sok.
answer: On Tuesday we have fish and chips, tomatoes and juice.

question: V sredo imamo juho in palačinke.
answer: On Wednesday we have soup and pancakes.

question: V četrtek imamo piščanca, kumare, krompir in torto.
answer: On Thursday we have chicken, cucumbers, potato and cake.

question: V petek imamo pico in jagode.
answer: On Friday we have pizza and strawberries.

question: V soboto imamo kruh, ocvrti jajci, sir, salamo in zeleno solato.
answer: On Saturday we have bread, fried eggs, cheese, salami and lettuce.

question: V nedeljo imamo meso, korenje, brokoli, fižol, krompir in zavitek.
answer: On Sunday we have meat, carrots, broccoli, beans, potatoes and strudel.

question: Denis ima rad sok, ne mara pa kakava.
answer: Denis likes juice, but he doesn't like cocoa.

question: Denis ima rad zeleno solato, ne mara pa pice.
answer: Denis likes lettuce, but he doesn't like pizza.

question: Denis ima rad mleko, ne mara pa kave.
answer: Denis likes milk, but he doesn't like coffee.

question: Denis ima rad ananas, ne mara pa pomfrija.
answer: Denis likes pineapple, but he doesn't like chips.

question: Denis ima rad sladoled, ne mara pa tort.
answer: Denis likes ice cream, but he doesn't like cakes.

question: Kaj je danes za večerjo? Imeli bomo juho, piščanca, pomfri in paradižnike.
answer: What's for dinner today? We're having soup, chicken, chips and tomatoes.

question: Lahko dobim malo pomfrija, prosim? Ja, srček. Izvoli.
answer: Can I have some chips, please? Yes, sweetie. Here you are.

question: Ali imaš rad sladoled? Ja, imam. Obožujem ga.
answer: Do you like ice cream? Yes, I do. I love it.

question: Ali ima tvoj pes tudi rad sladoled? Ne, nima. Je samo meso.
answer: Does your dog like ice cream, too? No, he doesn't. He only eats meat.

question: Kaj izdeluješ? Ne povem ti. To je presenečenje.
answer: What are you making? I'm not telling you. It's a surprise.

question: Rad imam pomfri. Kaj imaš rad ti? Rad imam pico.
answer: I like chips. What do you like? I like pizza.

question: Kaj starši pogosto rečejo? Pojej svoj zajtrk.
answer: What do parents often say? Eat your breakfast.

question: Kdaj delaš domačo nalogo? Ko pridem domov iz šole.
answer: When do you do your homework? When I come home from school.

question: Kdaj je tvoja rojstnodnevna zabava? V petek.
answer: When's your birthday party? On Friday.

question: Ob kateri uri greš v šolo? Ob sedmih zjutraj.
answer: What time do you go to school? At 7 o'clock in the morning.

question: Lahko dobim malo sladoleda, prosim?
answer: Can I have some ice cream, please?

question: Lačna lisica hodi skozi gozd. Nenadoma zagleda vrano.
answer: A hungry fox is walking through the woods. Suddenly she sees a crow.

question: Vrana sedi na drevesu. V kljunu ima velik kos sira.
answer: The crow is sitting in a tree. It has a very big piece of cheese in its beak.

question: V štedilniku gori ogenj.
answer: There is fire in the stove.

question: Gostje prihajajo na večerjo.
answer: There are guests coming to dinner.

question: Štorklje letijo po zraku.
answer: There are storks flying in the air.

question: Po zabavi ni ostalo nič torte.
answer: There is no cake left after the party.

question: Po zabavi ni ostalo nič sira.
answer: There is no cheese left after the party.

question: Po zabavi ni ostalo nič soka.
answer: There is no juice left after the party.

question: Po zabavi ni ostalo nič pomfrija.
answer: There is no chips left after the party.

question: Po zabavi ni ostalo nič coca-cole.
answer: There is no coca cola left after the party.

question: Juho jemo z žlico.
answer: We eat soup with a spoon.

question: Zabava se začne ob šestih.
answer: The party starts at six o'clock.

question: Mama nima rada banan v svojem sendviču.
answer: Mum doesn't like bananas in her sandwich.

question: Vse najboljše za rojstni dan, Twig. — Hvala, Hookie.
answer: Happy birthday, Twig. — Thank you, Hookie.

question: Fant želi kokakolo, nekaj pomfrija, banano … in njegova mama postane jezena.
answer: The boy wants a coke, some chips, a banana… and his mum gets angry.

question: Za zajtrk Katie je kruh, maslo in marmelado.
answer: For breakfast, Katie eats bread, butter and jam.

question: Nejc za zajtrk je sendvič.
answer: Nejc eats a sandwich for breakfast.

question: Za kosilo ima Katie sendvič.
answer: For lunch, Katie has a sandwich.

question: Nejc za kosilo je juho, meso, pomfri in zeleno solato.
answer: Nejc eats soup, meat, chips and lettuce for lunch.

question: Za večerjo Katie je piščanca, paradižnike, pomfri in torto.
answer: For dinner, Katie eats chicken, tomatoes, chips and cake.

question: Nejc ima za večerjo kruh in ocvrta jajca.
answer: Nejc has bread and fried eggs for dinner.

question: Rada ima sok, za špagete pa ji je vseeno.
answer: She likes juice, but she doesn't mind about spaghetti.

question: Cindy obožuje jagode, za piščanca pa ji je vseeno.
answer: Cindy loves strawberries and she doesn't mind about chicken.

question: Ne mara mleka in sovraži zeleno solato.
answer: He doesn't like milk and he hates lettuce.

question: Johnny pride v šolo ob 10. uri.
answer: Johnny comes to school at 10 o'clock.

question: Johnny gre domov ob štirih.
answer: Johnny goes home at four o'clock.

question: Johnny ima večerjo ob petih.
answer: Johnny has dinner at five o'clock.

question: Johnny dela svojo domačo nalogo ob osmih.
answer: Johnny does his homework at eight o'clock.

question: Kdaj imamo zelenjavno juho in palačinke?
answer: When do we have vegetable soup and pancakes?

question: Kdaj imamo bučno juho in sadno pito?
answer: When do we have pumpkin soup and fruit pie?

question: Kdaj jemo grahovo juho, purana, riž in zeleno solato?
answer: When do we eat pea soup, turkey, rice and lettuce?

question: Kdaj jemo mesne kroglice v paradižnikovi omaki in pire krompir?
answer: When do we eat meatballs in tomato sauce and mashed potatoes?

question: Kaj morske pošasti jedo za kosilo?
answer: What do sea monsters eat for lunch?

question: Kaj je oranžno in zveni kot papiga?
answer: What's orange and sounds like a parrot?

question: Kateri dan krompirji najbolj sovražijo?
answer: What day do potatoes hate the most?

question: Kaj je najbolje dati v pito? Svoje zobe!
answer: What's the best thing to put into a pie? Your teeth!

question: Če bi imel v eni roki 5 pomaranč in v drugi 5 hrušk, kaj bi imel? Ogromne roke.
answer: If you had 5 oranges in one hand and 5 pears in the other hand, what would you have? Enormous hands.

question: Kaj je jabolko reklo hrošču? Nehaj me gnjaviti!
answer: What did the apple say to the bug? Stop bugging me!

question: Kaj je banana rekla opici? Nič. Banane ne znajo govoriti.
answer: What did the banana say to the monkey? Nothing. Bananas can't talk.

question: Zakaj banane niso nikoli osamljene? Ker se družijo v grozdih.
answer: Why are bananas never lonely? Because they hang around in bunches.

question: Kaj je rdeče in se premika gor in dol? Paradižnik v dvigalu.
answer: What is red and goes up and down? A tomato in elevator.

question: "Dobro jutro, gospodična vrana," reče lisica.
answer: Good morning, Miss Crow, says the fox.

question: "Kako dobro izgledaš danes, kako lepa so tvoja peresa, kako lepe so tvoje oči!"
answer: How good you look today, how beautiful your feathers are, how nice your eyes are!

question: "Gotovo imaš čudovit glas – mi lahko zapješ pesem?"
answer: You must have a beautiful voice – can you sing me a song?

question: Vrana je zelo vesela takšnih lepih besed, zato odpre kljun.
answer: The crow is very happy to hear such nice words so she opens her mouth.

question: Velik kos sira pade naravnost v lisičja usta.
answer: The big piece of cheese falls right into the fox's mouth.

question: Kralj je suh in visok.
answer: The king is thin and tall.

question: Kuhar je majhen in debel.
answer: The cook is short and fat.

question: Ali imaš rad pico za zajtrk?
answer: Do you like pizza for breakfast?

question: Kaj daš v svojo najljubšo palačinko?
answer: What do you put in your favourite pancake?

question: Po zabavi je ostalo le še eno mleko.
answer: There's only one milk left after the party.

question: Za moje kosilo in mojo večerjo je zelenjavni zrezek vedno zmagovalec.
answer: For my lunch and for my dinner, a veggie steak is always winner.

question: Paradižnik, zelena solata, bučna pita so dobri za želodec in moje oči.
answer: Tomato, lettuce, pumpkin pie, are good for stomach and my eye.
